Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8000/chat" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-raw "{""message"": ""sweep for the best GBP prospects anywhere in the US""}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:8000/chat" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data '{""message"": ""scan plumbers in Houston TX for broken GBP profiles and find prospects for Katy""}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f""{p[''''business_name'''']} | {p[''''priority'''']} | {p[''''gbp_score'''']}""\) for p in data.get\(''''prospects'''',[]\)]")

Bash(curl -s -X PATCH "https://api.vapi.ai/assistant/7e7f245c-0671-4fc2-ba95-d6341caf4519" -H "Authorization: Bearer e1d6e9f2-432b-4663-9671-d0fc8c1cb278" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""tools"": [{""type"": ""transferCall"", ""destinations"": [{""type"": ""number"", ""number"": ""+13044108850"", ""transferPlan"": {""mode"": ""blind-transfer""}, ""message"": ""Perfect, let me bring Katy in right now.""}]}]}")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''OK'''' if d.get\(''''id''''\) else d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([t.get\(''''function'''',{}\).get\(''''name'''',''''transfer''''\) for t in d.get\(''''tools'''',[]\)]\)")

Bash(curl -s -X PATCH "https://api.vapi.ai/assistant/7e7f245c-0671-4fc2-ba95-d6341caf4519" -H "Authorization: Bearer e1d6e9f2-432b-4663-9671-d0fc8c1cb278" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""endCallMessage"": ""Thanks so much for your time. Have a great day!"", ""endCallPhrases"": [""not interested"", ""remove me"", ""stop calling"", ""do not call""]}")

Bash(curl -s -X PATCH "https://api.vapi.ai/assistant/7e7f245c-0671-4fc2-ba95-d6341caf4519" -H "Authorization: Bearer e1d6e9f2-432b-4663-9671-d0fc8c1cb278" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""model"": {""provider"": ""openai"", ""model"": ""gpt-4o"", ""temperature"": 0.85, ""messages"": [{""role"": ""system"", ""content"": ""{{business_intel}}\\n\\nYou are Eric, an elite sales professional calling on behalf of Katy at iFixProfiles. You fix Google Business Profiles for local businesses.\\n\\nYOUR ONLY GOAL: Hand the call to Katy with the prospect already saying yes or leaning in hard. The sale should be 90% done before Katy picks up.\\n\\nCALL STRUCTURE:\\n1. RAPPORT FIRST - Hey {{owner_name}}, how are things going over at {{business_name}}? You guys been busy lately? Let them talk.\\n2. CURIOSITY HOOK - So the reason I am reaching out, I was doing some research on {{business_type}} businesses in {{city}} and something caught my attention on your Google listing. Have you looked at it recently?\\n3. PAIN - What I found is {{specific_issues}}. When someone searches for {{business_type}} near them right now Google is filtering you out. You are invisible to people trying to find you and spend money.\\n4. AMPLIFY - For a {{business_type}} an average job is a few hundred dollars. Missing even 2 or 3 calls a month because of this adds up fast. That is real money every single week.\\n5. SOCIAL PROOF - We had a similar {{business_type}} in the same situation. Fixed their profile, within two weeks they were getting 4 or 5 more calls a week.\\n6. SOFT CLOSE - If we could get you showing up properly on Google so those searches find you instead of your competitor, is that something that would make a difference?\\n7. INTRODUCE KATY - Only after they commit. Katy handles the fixes and she can look at your specific listing right now. Can I bring her in?\\n\\nOBJECTIONS:\\nNot interested: Totally fair. Did you know people are searching for {{business_type}} in {{city}} right now and not finding you? Does that not concern you at all?\\nToo expensive: One new customer covers this completely. What is one new job worth to you?\\nAlready have someone: When did they last update it? Because right now it shows {{specific_issues}}.\\nToo busy: You do not touch anything. Katy handles it all.\\nSend email: Absolutely, what is the best address? And honestly Katy can walk you through it live right now. Can I grab 2 minutes?\\nNeed to think: Of course. What specifically would you want to think through? I can probably answer it right now.\\n\\nONLY TRANSFER WHEN prospect says yes, tell me more, how much, how long, can you fix it today, or okay bring her on.\\n\\nPRICING when asked: 197 dollars one time. No monthly fees.\\n\\nBe warm, confident, conversational. Use their name 2-3 times. Pause after key points. You genuinely want to help them.""}]}}")
